name: Eva Limousine Bus Inc
recent_news: No school-bus or student-transportation presence found in 2026 web search; Tacoma Public Schools contracts with First Student for regular routes and runs SPED in-house, with EverDriven providing alternative student transport.
fit_notes: Not a fit: 2-employee limousine operator with no evidence of school-district contracts or yellow-bus fleet. Tacoma student transport is locked up by First Student and in-house SPED. Disqualify as a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Nostalgia Limousine
recent_news: No web footprint as a student-transportation provider; Sumner-Bonney Lake SD operates its own transportation department and no contracting relationship with Nostalgia Limousine surfaces.
fit_notes: Not a fit: micro-operator (2 employees, single-vehicle tier) in the wedding/special-occasion limo segment. No school-bus fleet, no district contracts. Disqualify.

name: S & M Limousine Svc
recent_news: No verifiable web presence as a school-bus or student-transport contractor; Lakewood-area student transportation is run by Clover Park SD/Lakewood SD in-house or via established contractors, not S&M.
fit_notes: Not a fit: single-vehicle livery service with no school-district footprint, no exec name on file, and no fleet evidence. Disqualify as a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Vintage Limousine LLC
recent_news: No evidence of school-bus operations; Kennewick SD runs its own transportation department. Vintage Limousine appears to be a wedding/event limo micro-operator in the Tri-Cities.
fit_notes: Not a fit: 2-employee limo LLC with no fleet of yellow buses and no district contracts identifiable. Disqualify.

name: All Occasion Limousine
recent_news: Columbus, OH market shows several limo/party-bus operators serving prom/homecoming/wedding; no school-district route contracting tied to All Occasion Limousine. Columbus City Schools and surrounding districts run home-to-school transport in-house or via large contractors.
fit_notes: Not a fit: micro-operator (2 employees, $127k revenue) in the special-occasion limo segment, not a school-bus or SPED contractor. Disqualify as a Summit tuck-in target.
